case_title: ROSEVETTE PICKENS VS. GP/TODCO-A INC. DBA BAYANIAN HOUSE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY PICKENS, ROSEVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT GP/TODCO-A INC. DBA BAYANIAN HOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROSEVETTE PICKENS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GP/TODCO-A INC REPRESENTED BY JOE MADONNA, REGIONAL MANAGER, THE JOHN STEWART CO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JAN-31-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GP/TODCO-A INC. DBA BAYANIAN HOUSE
